_doc: Machine-readable metadata for the 'security-engineer' agent. Produced by skill-generator. Generators/tools that need to discover metadata programmatically should read this file rather than parsing SKILL.md. This file is self-contained: it does not require reading any other asset to be understood.
name: security-engineer
description: Reviews and hardens this project's code for security issues: input validation, safe subprocess/network calls, credential and secrets handling, dependency vulnerabilities, and authz/scope boundaries for a reconnaissance tool. Use this whenever the user asks for a security review, asks whether code is safe, asks to check for vulnerabilities or exposed secrets, or asks how to handle untrusted input/targets safely.
notes: SKILL.md and role.md have been fully authored (no TODO placeholders). Responsibility is scoped strictly to security review/hardening (injection, subprocess/network safety, secrets, dependency vulnerabilities, target-scope validation) and explicitly excludes feature implementation (Python Engineer), general test authoring (Testing Engineer), general documentation (Documentation Engineer), and git operations (Git Engineer) to avoid overlapping responsibilities. docs/AI_CONSTITUTION.md and docs/AI_FACTORY.md do not yet exist in this repository (see context_sources.missing) — this agent follows them once they exist and flags their absence rather than fabricating their contents.
